q: What is Gojan School of Business and Technology?
a: Gojan School of Business and Technology is an engineering college established in 2005, located on an 80-acre campus at Redhills, Chennai. It is affiliated to Anna University and accredited by NAAC.
Gojan is located at 80 Feet Road, Edapalayam, Redhills, Chennai, Tamil Nadu - 600 052.

q: What is the TNEA code for Gojan?
a: The TNEA counselling code for Gojan School of Business and Technology is 1123.

q: What courses are offered at Gojan?
a: Gojan offers 8 UG programmes: B.E. Aeronautical, CSE, ECE, AI-ML, Cyber Security, Medical Electronics, Mechanical and Automation, and B.Tech IT. PG programme: MBA.

q: How do I apply to Gojan?
a: For engineering, apply through TNEA counselling (code 1123). For MBA, apply through TANCET. Online: https://forms.gle/W1pEKX2kHno97YfK9
Contact Gojan at +91 7010723984 or +91 7010723985, or email gsbt@gojaneducation.tech.

q: Is Gojan affiliated to Anna University?
a: Yes, Gojan is affiliated to Anna University, Chennai.
Yes, Gojan School of Business and Technology is accredited by NAAC.
Gojan has an 80-acre campus at Redhills, Chennai.
Yes, Gojan provides separate hostel facilities for boys and girls.
The campus has library, modern labs, WiFi, sports facilities, canteen, hostel, and bus transport from various parts of Chennai.
Gojan School of Business and Technology was established in 2005.

q: What is the eligibility for admission?
a: For B.E./B.Tech, complete 12th with PCM, minimum 45% aggregate (40% reserved). Admissions through TNEA counselling.

q: Does Gojan have a placement cell?
a: Yes, Gojan has an active placement cell and an ED Cell connecting students with industry opportunities.
The official email is gsbt@gojaneducation.tech.
Yes, Gojan offers MBA as a postgraduate programme.
Gojan has various student clubs under Gojan Clubs, NSS, IEEE Student Branch, and an ED Cell.
Yes, Gojan is recognized by AICTE, New Delhi.

q: What is the vision of Gojan?
a: To create a dynamic community of educated youth with quality education at affordable cost and employable skills.

q: Does Gojan have AI ML course?
a: Yes, Gojan offers B.E. Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Engineering.

q: Does Gojan have Cyber Security course?
a: Yes, Gojan offers B.E. Cyber Security Engineering.
Yes, Gojan provides bus transport connecting various parts of Chennai to the Redhills campus.
Gojan has departments for Aeronautical, CSE, ECE, IT, AI-ML, Cyber Security, Mechanical & Automation, Medical Electronics Engineering, and MBA.

q: Tell me about the AI ML course
a: The B.E. AI-ML programme at Gojan covers artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, and data science. It is affiliated to Anna University.
For detailed fee structure, contact the admissions office at +91 7010723984 or email gsbt@gojaneducation.tech.
Companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, and others visit Gojan for campus recruitment through the placement cell.

q: Does Gojan have a coding club?
a: Yes, Gojan has various technical clubs under Gojan Clubs including coding and robotics activities.

q: What is the bus route from Chennai Central?
a: Gojan provides bus transport from various Chennai locations. For specific routes, contact +91 7010723984.

q: Who is the chairman of Gojan?
a: For details about the chairman and management, visit https://gojaneducation.tech/chairman-2/ or contact the college.
Gojan has a beautiful 80-acre campus with modern labs, library, sports grounds, hostel, WiFi, and green spaces at Redhills, Chennai.
Gojan has an active NSS unit organizing community service, blood donation camps, environmental activities, and social awareness programmes.
The campus has sports grounds for cricket, football, volleyball, basketball, and indoor games.
Gojan library has thousands of books, journals, digital resources, and OPAC system for all departments.
Faculty and students engage in research with publications in national and international journals and conferences.
Gojan facilitates government scholarships and institutional scholarships based on academic performance.
B.E. Aeronautical Engineering at Gojan covers aircraft design, propulsion, aerodynamics, and is affiliated to Anna University.
B.E. Electronics and Communication Engineering covers signal processing, VLSI, communication systems, embedded systems.
B.E. Mechanical and Automation Engineering covers thermodynamics, manufacturing, CAD/CAM, and automation technologies.
B.E. Medical Electronics Engineering covers biomedical instrumentation, medical imaging, and healthcare technology.
B.Tech Information Technology covers software development, databases, networking, web technologies, and cloud computing.

q: Gojan college la evvalavu courses iruku?
a: Gojan la 8 UG courses iruku - CSE, ECE, IT, AI-ML, Cyber Security, Aeronautical, Mechanical, Medical Electronics. Plus MBA PG course um iruku.
Engineering ku TNEA counselling la apply pananum. TNEA code 1123. Online apply ku https://forms.gle/W1pEKX2kHno97YfK9 ku po.
Aama, boys hostel um girls hostel um separate-a iruku. Rooms furnished-a irukum, mess facility um iruku.
Gojan campus 80 acres perusu. Redhills Chennai la iruku. Nalla spacious campus.
Aama, placement cell romba active. TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant ellam campus ku vanthu recruit panuvanga.
Aama, Gojan Anna University Chennai affiliated college. Exam, results ellam Anna University thaan nadathum.
+91 7010723984 la call pannu. Illa na gsbt@gojaneducation.tech ku mail pannu.
Aama, B.E. Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Engineering iruku. Nalla future-oriented course.

q: Bus route iruka Chennai la irundhu?
a: Aama, Chennai oda pala areas la irundhu college bus service iruku. Details ku +91 7010723984 la kelu.
Aama, library la thousands of books iruku, digital resources um iruku. Ella departments ku separate section iruku.
Exact fees therinja admissions office la kelu: +91 7010723984. Illa na gsbt@gojaneducation.tech ku mail pannu.
Aama, Gojan NAAC accredited college. Quality confirm-a iruku.
Gojan Clubs la coding club, robotics, NSS, IEEE Student Branch, cultural club, sports club ellam iruku.
Chairman details ku https://gojaneducation.tech/chairman-2/ la paaru. Illa na college la kelu.
Gojan oda TNEA counselling code 1123. Itha TNEA counselling time la use pannu.
Gojan 2005 la established aanathu. 80 acre campus Redhills Chennai la iruku.
Aama, B.E. Cyber Security Engineering iruku. Nalla demand ulla course ithu.
12th PCM la 45% marks venum general category ku. Reserved category ku 40%. TNEA counselling la apply pananum.
B.E. Medical Electronics Engineering - biomedical instruments, medical imaging pathiyellam padikalam. Healthcare tech ku nalla course.
Aama, NSS unit active-a iruku. Blood donation camp, social service, environment activities ellam nadakkum.
Arrear exam Anna University thaan nadathum. Semester end la arrear exam ezhuthalaam. Don't worry, guidance kudupanga.
Anna University exam standard-a irukum. But faculty nalla prepare pannuvanga, previous year papers um kudupanga.
Canteen la meals, snacks, tea, coffee ellam kidaikum. Affordable price-la nalla food iruku.
Illa, Gojan la strict anti-ragging policy iruku. Seniors nalla friendly-a irupanga, tension padaathinga.
Aama, weekdays la formal dress code follow pananum. ID card mandatory-a wear pananum campus la.
CSE, IT, AI-ML students ku laptop irundha nalladu. Lab la computers iruku but own laptop useful-a irukum.
Aama, placement cell internship opportunities arrange pannuvanga. Third year la companies ku apply pannalam.
Year-la oru big cultural fest nadakkum plus department-wise events um irukum. Dance, music, drama ellam pannalam.
Aama, campus area safe-a iruku. College bus service iruku, so travel ku tension illa.
First year la basics padipanga - physics, chemistry, maths, English. Second year la un department subjects start aagum.
Aama, 75% attendance minimum venum Anna University rule padiye. Attendance short-a iruntha exam ezhudha mudiyaadhu.
Arrear exam next semester la ezhuthalaam. Maximum try la pass pannidalam. Faculty guidance kudupanga.
Aama, diploma finish pannavanga ku lateral entry iruku. Directly second year la join pannalam.
Admission details ku directly college-a contact pannunga: +91 7010723984. Counselling process pathi solluvaanga.
College WiFi campus-la iruku. IT department-la register pannina login credentials tharuvaanga.
Sports facilities iruku campus la. Gym and fitness area pathi sports department la enquiry pannunga.
Aama, Gojan Clubs la hackathons, coding contests regularly nadakkum. IEEE branch um technical events organize pannuvanga.
Gojan alumni various companies la irukanga. Alumni meets um networking events um nadakkum campus la.
Oru semester 6 months irukum approximately. Year la 2 semesters irukum plus exam period.
Hostel students ku 24/7 stay iruku. Day scholars ku hostel option iruku, admissions office la kelu.
Usually morning 9 AM la classes start aagum, 4 PM vara irukum. Saturday half day irukum.
Aama, symposiums la paper presentation, project exhibition, technical quiz ellam nadakkum regularly.
Faculty guidance iruku GATE preparation ku. Library la GATE books um iruku. Self study important.
Aama, annual college magazine publish pannuvanga. Student articles, poems, artwork ellam include pannuvanga.
Cricket, football, volleyball, basketball, athletics team ellam iruku. Inter-college tournaments la participate pannalam.
Lab sessions timetable padiye irukum, usually 3 hours per session. Practical exam ku nalla prepare pannum.
Boys um girls um irukanga. Co-education college ithu. Girls hostel um separate-a iruku.
Aama, final year project ku faculty guide assign pannuvanga. Industry collaboration projects um iruku.
80 acre campus, Anna University affiliated, NAAC accredited, active placement cell - overall nalla college. Visit pannitu paarunga.
